nasb.text: Better are those slain with the sword Than those slain with hunger; For they pine away, being stricken For lack of the fruits of the field.

esv.text: Happier were the victims of the sword than the victims of hunger, who wasted away, pierced by lack of the fruits of the field.

cnv.text: 那些死於刀下的比餓死的還好； 餓死的因缺乏田間的出產，就日漸消瘦而死亡。

ccb.text: 死于刀下的胜过死于饥饿的， 后者因田间缺粮而活活饿死。
